output.revisionContext: Dark mode padding updated to match DynamicContentCarousel: container py-10 md:py-15 changed to py-18 md:py-23 (+32px vertical padding), pseudo-element before:-inset-y-8 changed to before:inset-y-0 (now contained within padding).
output.scope: Dark mode padding verification at 1440px desktop breakpoint only.

figmaComparison.comparedAgainst: Figma desktop screenshot showing dark charcoal background with generous vertical padding around content

verifiedChecks.observation: Approximately 92px of padding visible above the PARTNERS eyebrow text. The charcoal background starts with smooth rounded corners, and there is generous breathing room before the first content element. Matches the Figma design proportions.
Substantial bottom padding visible below the last card row (CTA buttons) before the charcoal background ends with rounded bottom corners. Content is fully contained within the dark area with no gaps.
The charcoal background pseudo-element is fully contained within the section padding. No overflow or gaps visible at top or bottom edges. The rounded corners are cleanly rendered.
The Dark Two Columns section shows the same generous padding pattern -- substantial space above the heading and below the cards. Consistent with the 3-column variant.
The minimal dark mode section (no header, cards only) shows consistent padding. Bottom padding below cards is generous and the charcoal background terminates cleanly.
The dark mode padding pattern (py-18 md:py-23 with before:inset-y-0) is now consistent across CardsGrid, CardsCarousel, GalleryCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and DynamicContentCarousel.
